column1: # F3K Flight Unit — Custom Partition Table
#   otadata   8 KB   — OTA slot tracking (unused but required by bootloader)
#   Place this file in the sketch folder alongside f3k_flight_unit_gps.ino
#   Arduino IDE: Tools → Partition Scheme → Custom
#   Reflash after changing partition scheme — LittleFS will be erased.
#   Re-run f3k_config_writer to restore unit ID after reflash.
